examples: Leaving the domain of the forest giants, follow an old tramline for 13.1km to another perched lake, Lake Garawongera.
We were walking along a wet Edinburgh street of pubs and sandwich shops, hemmed in by the construction of a new tramline.
Mr Hotten alleged that "tramline" bruising on the toddler had been identified by a pathologist as being consistent with having been struck, at force, with a rod or stick.
